creator: bjn@visi.com
text:
In accordance with popular demand :-) this patch changes the
	www/web500gw port to install the LDAP<->HTTP gateway into
	/usr/local/bin, as one would to run it in stand-alone or inetd
	mode.  The pkg/MESSAGE mechanism is used to print a message
	describing how to install it in nph-CGI mode.  I tested the
	gateway in all three modes.

	The result is that this port no longer DEPENDs on a web server.
	I like it.

	This patch also removes the man page from pkg/PLIST.

How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
